headline: Assessing Regions Financial (RF) Valuation After A Choppy Period For The Share Price
summary: Key recent performance Without a single clear event driving headlines, Regions Financial (RF) has still given investors a mix of outcomes, with a 0.3% decline over the past day, a 4.3% gain over the week, and an 11% move over the past month. See our latest analysis for Regions Financial. Recent trading has been choppy, with the share price at $27.75 and a 30 day share price return of 11% sitting alongside a flat 90 day move and a strong 1 year total shareholder return of 48.9%.
